---
title: 'BridgeQG Vade Mecum'
---

```mindmap-graph

Vade Mecum {shape:circle, color:#daffcc} -> Emergent, Nonclassical and Fuzzy Spacetime {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Emergent_nonclassical_and_fuzzy_spacetime.html}
Vade Mecum -> Equivalence Principle, locality and quantum gravity {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Equivalence_principle.html}
Vade Mecum -> Gravitationally-induced quantum effects {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Gravitationally-induced_quantum_effects.html}
Vade Mecum -> IR-UV mixing {url:/VadeMecum/doc/IR-UV_mixing.html}
Vade Mecum -> In-vacuo dispersion {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Invacuo_dispersion.html}
Vade Mecum -> Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries {url:/VadeMecum/doc/LIV_DSR.html}
Vade Mecum -> Low-energy table-top experiments {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Low-energy_table-top_experiments.html}

Emergent, Nonclassical and Fuzzy Spacetime -> Quantum causality {shape:circle, color:#fdbcce, url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/Quantum_causality.html} 

```

<!--Vade Mecum -> Second level topics {shape:circle, color:#fdbcce}
Vade Mecum -> Examples {shape:circle, color:#daffcc}

Second level topics -> Quantum Gravity Scale {url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/QGscale.html}
Second level topics -> Time delays {url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/time_delay.html}

Examples -> How to use the Wiki {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example0.html}
Examples -> How to write QMarkdown {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example1.html}
Examples -> How to write LaTeX {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example2.html}
-->
